title: Log in and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and lands on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Log out from a protected page
description: Verifies a logged-in user can log out and is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Update item stock from item details and record a stock transaction
description: Verifies a user can open an item’s details, perform a quick stock update, and see updated stock plus a new transaction entry in the item history.

steps.description: Fill a unique item name into the item name field
Fill a valid unit into the unit field
Fill 1 into the minimum stock field
Click the newly created item in the item list to open its details
Choose to update stock from the item detail page
Fill a new valid stock value into the stock update field
Verify the item detail shows the updated stock and a new transaction appears in the item transaction history

title: Search and filter items in item list
description: Verifies users can search and apply a category filter on the item list and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the item list
Fill a search term into the item search field
Select a category in the category filter
Verify the item list shows results consistent with the applied search and filter

title: View dashboard statistics and navigate via quick action
description: Verifies the dashboard shows key statistic cards and a quick action can navigate to a primary workflow page.

steps.description: Verify the dashboard statistics cards are displayed
Use a dashboard quick action to navigate to a primary page such as item list or transaction creation
Verify the destination page content is displayed

title: Open full transaction list from recent transactions
description: Verifies a user can use the dashboard recent transactions section to navigate to the full transaction list page.

steps.description: Verify recent transactions are displayed on the dashboard
Click the link to view the full transaction list
Verify the full transaction list page is displayed

title: Create receipt letter preview and generate DOCX
description: Verifies an authenticated user can fill receipt metadata and item list, preview the letter, and generate a DOCX receipt download.

steps.description: Fill a unique nomor_surat into the nomor surat field
Fill a valid date into the tanggal field
Fill a sender name into the dari field
Fill a recipient name into the kepada field
Fill a valid barang_list value into the item list field using the format expected by the page
Trigger the preview of the receipt letter
Verify a DOCX file download is initiated

title: Admin creates a new item from the create form
description: Verifies an admin can create a new inventory item and is redirected back to the item list with a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill a unique item name into the item name field
Fill a valid unit into the unit field
Fill a valid initial stock into the stock field
Fill a valid minimum stock into the minimum stock field
Verify the user is redirected to the item list and a success confirmation is visible

title: Export quarterly stock opname as DOCX from preview
description: Verifies an authenticated user can export the quarterly stock opname DOCX after previewing the selected quarter and year.

steps.description: Trigger the preview for the selected period
Trigger the export action to generate the DOCX report
Verify a DOCX file download is initiated

title: Preview quarterly stock opname for a selected quarter and year
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select a quarter and year and see a stock opname preview table for that period.

steps.description: Trigger the preview for the selected period
Verify a quarterly stock opname preview table is displayed

title: Show receipt preview with entered metadata and item list
description: Verifies the receipt preview reflects the user-entered metadata and items before generating the DOCX.

steps.description: Fill a unique nomor_surat into the nomor surat field
Fill a valid date into the tanggal field
Fill a sender name into the dari field
Fill a recipient name into the kepada field
Fill a barang_list value that contains at least one clearly identifiable item name into the item list field using the format expected by the page
Trigger the preview of the receipt letter
Verify the preview displays the entered nomor_surat and at least one item from the barang_list

title: Admin bulk deletes items and receives relation-protection feedback
description: Verifies an admin can select multiple items for bulk deletion and receives UI feedback indicating which items were deleted or blocked due to related transactions.

steps.description: Fill a unique item name into the item name field
Fill a valid unit into the unit field
Fill 1 into the minimum stock field
Select one or more items in the item list using selection controls
Verify a bulk delete result message is visible indicating deletion success and/or that some items could not be deleted due to related transactions

title: Validate required fields before generating receipt letter
description: Verifies the receipt letter cannot be generated when a required field is empty and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Fill a unique nomor_surat into the nomor surat field
Fill a valid date into the tanggal field
Fill a recipient name into the kepada field
Fill a valid barang_list value into the item list field using the format expected by the page
Verify a validation error indication is displayed for required fields

title: Preserve selected quarter and year when returning to quarterly stock page after preview
description: Verifies the selected quarter and year remain set after generating a preview so the user does not lose their chosen period.

steps.description: Trigger the preview for the selected period
Verify the quarter and year selectors still show the selected values

title: Block export when quarter/year not selected
description: Verifies the user cannot export a quarterly stock opname report without selecting the required period inputs and sees a validation indication.

steps.description: Clear the quarter selection if a value is preselected
Clear the year selection if a value is preselected
Trigger the export action to generate the DOCX report
Verify a validation error indication is displayed for missing required inputs

title: Block receipt generation when barang_list is missing or invalid format
description: Verifies the receipt letter cannot be generated when the item list is missing or not in the expected format and a validation indication is shown.

steps.description: Fill a unique nomor_surat into the nomor surat field
Fill a valid date into the tanggal field
Fill a sender name into the dari field
Fill a recipient name into the kepada field
Fill an intentionally invalid barang_list value into the item list field
Verify a validation error indication is displayed for the item list field

title: Show error on invalid login credentials
description: Verifies submitting invalid credentials shows an invalid-credentials error and the user remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Fill invalid_user into the username field
Fill wrong_password into the password field
Verify an invalid-credentials error is visible

title: Show empty-state preview when quarterly stock opname has no results
description: Verifies an authenticated user can preview a selected quarter/year and see an empty result indication when there is no data for that period.

steps.description: Select a quarter and year combination likely to have no results by choosing a different quarter or year than the current one
Trigger the preview for the selected period
Verify an empty state indication is displayed for the preview results
